dialogue.intro: I'm mid-build on something big and I'm missing one exact brick — I dropped it somewhere near the bank steps and haven't been able to finish since. Driving me up the wall, honestly.
dialogue.reminder: Still no brick? This build isn't going to finish itself...
dialogue.thanks: That's the one! You have no idea how long I've been staring at an unfinished wall because of this. Seriously, thank you.
dialogue.farewell: Go on, get back to your crossroads. And hey — thanks for not leaving my build half-finished.

dialogue.intro: I can't dance right without my lucky anklet — it's got the exact jingle I need for the beat drop. Lost it somewhere on the road. Bhangra just isn't the same without it!
dialogue.reminder: Still dancing without my anklet... it's just not right.
dialogue.thanks: Yes! Now THIS is a proper bhangra! Thank you, truly — you've got great timing, you know that?
dialogue.farewell: Dance well wherever you go next, friend. You've earned a spot in my next routine.

dialogue.intro: Lost my game ball somewhere around here before the big match. Can't practice right without it — it's got all my luck worked into the seams.
dialogue.reminder: Still no ball. Can't believe I lost track of it.
dialogue.thanks: My ball! Let's go! I owe you one — actually, I owe you a lot more than one.
dialogue.farewell: Catch you on the other side, champ. Keep that same energy.

dialogue.intro: A good manager keeps time — and I've misplaced my pocket watch somewhere along this street. Can't run a tight operation without it. My horse has been patient, but I haven't.
dialogue.reminder: Still no watch. Time waits for no one, you know.
dialogue.thanks: Ah, excellent — right on schedule. My thanks to you, truly. A good deed, well timed.
dialogue.farewell: Until our paths cross again. Keep good time out there.

dialogue.intro: Lost a cufflink somewhere on my morning walk — can't close a deal looking anything less than sharp. Find it and I'll remember the favor.
dialogue.reminder: Still missing that cufflink. Not a great look, honestly.
dialogue.thanks: There it is. Sharp as ever. I don't forget favors — you've got one coming, whenever you need it.
dialogue.farewell: Pleasure doing business, friend. Don't be a stranger.
